calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Enter Judgment Against Defendants And Enforce Settlement Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 664.6
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HE NENG'S Motion To Enter Judgment Against Defendants And Enforce Settlement Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 664.6

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to enter judgment against defendants and enforce settlement pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
